translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can Nâng cấp or downgrade your cloud Gói at any time. For Ngoại tuyến licenses, you can Nâng cấp by paying the difference.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open Nguồn core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which Gói you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The Miễn phí Gói has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the Tiếp month or Nâng cấp to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The Miễn phí Gói requires no credit card, no Tài khoản and no commitment. Just Tải xuống and Bắt đầu automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and Ngoại tuyến use. Cloud plans Thêm Nhóm Tính năng like shared Quy trình and collaboration.
